hooks.command: command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[failproofai] node not found; install Node >=20.9' >&2; exit 2; }; node scripts/dev-hook.mjs --hook PreToolUse --cli antigravity
command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '[failproofai] node not found; install Node >=20.9' >&2; exit 2; }; node scripts/dev-hook.mjs --hook PostToolUse --cli antigravity
